overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character traversing elevated industrial catwalks inside a large warehouse facility. The scene features dark atmospheric lighting with metal walkways, support beams, and distant city lights visible through structural openings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial catwalk inside warehouse facility

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated metal catwalk, moving deeper into the industrial facility

entered.detail: grated metal walkway with yellow safety lines running along the center
heavy steel support beams and trusswork forming the walkway structure
network of large industrial pipes and ventilation ducts running along the ceiling
massive industrial storage tank visible in the distance through the facility interior

segments.scene_description: The segment shows Batman traversing an elevated metal catwalk inside a dark industrial warehouse. Heavy steel support girders frame the walkway while overhead piping networks run along the ceiling. In the distance, a large cylindrical storage tank is visible through the facility's interior structure.

events.description: Local Surveillance UI element appears in top-right corner indicating nearby objectives or enemies

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway while approaching a corner turn, surveillance system now active

segments.scene_description: Batman continues along the elevated walkway as the Local Surveillance system activates, displaying objective markers on screen. The walkway curves slightly to the right as the character approaches a junction, with the large cylindrical tank structure now visible to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated industrial catwalk that shifts from a straight corridor into a curving junction. It begins with Batman traversing a dark warehouse, framed by heavy steel support girders and complex overhead piping networks. As the character moves forward, a large cylindrical storage tank emerges through the interior structure in the distance. The scene then shifts as the Local Surveillance system activates with on-screen objective markers, while the walkway curves slightly to the right. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a junction, bringing the massive cylindrical tank into clear view on the left side of the frame.
